mapper.sql: id, user_name, login_action, login_number, login_time, login_addr
mapper.insert:
insert into user_login_log
id,
user_name,
login_action,
login_number,
login_time,
login_addr,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{loginAction,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{loginNumber,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{loginTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{loginAddr,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update user_login_log
user_name = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
login_action = #{loginAction,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
login_number = #{loginNumber,jdbcType=INTEGER},
login_time = #{loginTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
login_addr = #{loginAddr,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update user_login_log set user_name = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, login_action = #{loginAction,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, login_number = #{loginNumber,jdbcType=INTEGER}, login_time = #{loginTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, login_addr = #{loginAddr,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.insert: insert into user_login_log (id, user_name, login_action, login_number, login_time, login_addr ) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginAction,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginNumber,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{loginTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{loginAddr,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE login_action = values(login_action), login_number = values(login_number), login_time = values(login_time), login_addr =values(login_addr)
mapper.select: SELECT sui.id as userId, sui.user_name as loginName, jdm.id as memberId,jdm.department_id as departId,jdi.`name` as departmentName, jdm.`name`, jdm.phone_number as phone,jdm.title,jdm.email FROM security_login.user_info sui LEFT JOIN jzg_realm_system.department_member jdm ON sui.user_name = jdm.login_name LEFT JOIN jzg_realm_system.department_info jdi ON jdm.department_id = jdi.id WHERE sui.user_name = #{userName}

SELECT sui.id as userId, sui.user_name as loginName, jdm.id as memberId,jdm.department_id as departId,jdi.`name` as departmentName, jdm.`name`, jdm.phone_number as phone,jdm.title,jdm.email FROM security_login.user_info sui LEFT JOIN jzg_realm_system.department_info jdi ON sui.user_name = jdi.leader_login_name LEFT JOIN jzg_realm_system.department_member jdm ON jdi.leader = jdm.id WHERE sui.user_name = #{userName}

select type_code from jzg_realm_system.merchant_type where type_name in
#{role}
select id,audit_state as auditState, ${tableName}_name as baseName from jzg_realm_system.report_base_${tableName} where user_id = ${userId} and is_delete = 0
